rows.title: DEWALT 20V MAX* XR 7-1/4 in. Metal Cutting Circular Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on tough applications with our most powerful 20V MAX* metal cutting circular saw†. This 20V MAX* XR 7¼ in. Metal Cutting Circular Saw delivers up to 1,400 MWO of power to help maximize productivity on the job. This tool features TOOL CONNECT+ capabilities for next-level visibility to utilization, asset management, tool location, and safety. With a lightweight design and integrated chip collector, this circular saw is part of our best performing line of 20V MAX* power tools (battery and charger sold separately.)
features: Our Most Powerful 20V MAX* Metal Cutting Circular Saw†
Help Maximize Productivity - Cuts up to 214 20-gauge steel studs** and cuts up to 105 feet of corrugated decking††.
Brushless Motor - Take on challenging metal cutting applications with a 20V MAX* brushless motor that delivers up to 1,400 MWO of power.
additional_features: Versatile Cut Capabilities - Complete a variety of applications with a 2-5/8 in. depth of cut.
Integrated Chip Collector - Help maintain a clean work area with a built-in chip collection solution.
Electronic Brake - Optimize control with the Electronic Brake that stops the blade in less than 1 second after the on/off trigger is released.
TOOL CONNECT+ Technology - Featuring integrated connectivity with the DEWALT Site Manager app††, providing users with data on asset management, tool location, utilization, and safety
Part Of Our Best Performing Line Of 20V MAX* Power Tools - Innovative power tools designed to deliver certainty for the world's toughest pros.
includes: (1) DCS383 20V MAX* XR 7¼ in. Metal Cutting Circular Saw (Tool Only)
(1) DWAM71448 7-1/4 in. 48T Metal Cutting Circular Saw Blade
disclaimers: *Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
**Per charge, using DCBP520 battery (sold separately) and DWAM71448 blade on 20-gauge nested steel studs 3 5/8".
‡Additional subscription charge and third party data rate charges may apply.
††Per charge, using DCBP520 battery (sold separately) and DWAM71448 blade on 20-gauge mild steel 1.5" Type B decking.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 6-1/2 in. Brushless Cordless Circular Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a variety of cutting applications with the 20V MAX* 6-1/2 in. Cordless Circular Saw. Equipped with a built-in rafter hook, bright LED, and optional dust chute, this saw is powered by a brushless motor that delivers 4,950 rpm. Built for versatility this saw delivers fast, accurate, and consistent cutting. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Powerful And Efficient - Brushless motor provides optimal cutting performance in a variety of materials
High Maneuverability - With its lightweight and compact design
Quickly Adjust - The bevel capacity from 0 - 50 degrees with the tool-free bevel lever
additional_features: Convenient Storage - On the jobsite with the built-in rafter hook
Added Safety - Electric brake quickly stops the blade after the trigger is released
Increased Visibility - And cut accuracy with bright LED
Minimize Dust While Cutting - With the optional dust chute, compatible with the DEWALT AirLock system or standard 35 mm dust extractor
Compatible With - All DEWALT 20V MAX* and FLEXVOLT Batteries
includes: (1) DCS565 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 6-1/2 in Circular Saw
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR 7-1/4 in. Brushless Circular Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Get the power and depth-of-cut of a corded circular saw with the portability and convenience of cordless. Powered by a brushless motor, the 20V MAX* XR Brushless Cordless 7-1/4 in. Circular Saw delivers excellent performance and runtime on tough jobs. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Power - Brushless motor provides 5500RPM maintaining speed under load
Runtime - 330 crosscuts in 2x4 (pine)
Capacity - 7-1/4" Blade provides 2-9/16" Cutting Capacity at 90 degrees
additional_features: Ease of Use - Bevel capacity up to 57 degrees for increased versatility
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: ATOMIC 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 4-1/2 in. Circular Saw (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a variety of applications with the compact ATOMIC 20V MAX* Brushless Cordless 4-1/2 in. Circular Saw. With a bevel gear design that allows for 90º cuts of 2X material and 45º cuts of 1X material, this circular saw cuts up to 369 linear feet of 3/4 in OSB using a DCB205 battery. As a part of the ATOMIC COMPACT SERIES, this tool is compatible with 20V MAX* batteries and chargers. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Brushless motor allows you to cut up to 369 linear feet of 3/4 in. OSB using DCB205 battery (sold separately)
Removable auxiliary handle for increased control
Hang hook for increased convenience
additional_features: On-board blade key storage for hassle free blade changes
1-1/2 in. finger trigger allows users to choke-up on tool if necessary for their application
Bevel gear allows users to cut 2x material at 90 degrees with a 4-1/2 in. blade
Electronic blade brake stops blade quickly for safety and productivity
Bevel lever gives user the ability to bevel at 45 degrees to cut 1x dimensional lumber
On-board dust port for dust control
includes: (1) DCS571 20V MAX* Brushless 4-1/2 in Circular Saw
applications: Cross-cutting 1x material such as base board and facia
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.

rows.title: 20V MAX* 7-1/4 in. Brushless Cordless Circular Saw With FLEXVOLT Advantage (Tool Only)
rows.description: Get up to 77% more power with the 20V MAX* 7-1/4 in. Brushless Cordless Circular Saw featuring FLEXVOLT Advantage technology**. Built with a powerful brushless motor that provides 5,500 rpm for fast cutting, this saw delivers a maximum depth of cut of 2-9/16 in. at a 90º. As a part of the expanding 20V MAX* lineup, this tool is compatible with 20V MAX* batteries and chargers. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Up To 77% More Poiwer** - When paired with FLEXVOLT batteries
Faster Cutting - Powerful brushless motor delivers 5,500 RPM for faster cutting
Maximum Depth Of Cut - 2-9/16 in. at a 90 degrees
additional_features: Maximum Depth Of Cut - 2 in. at a 45 degrees
Electric Brake - Stops the blade after the trigger is released
Increased Visibility - Bright LED increases visibility and cut accuracy
Easy Storage - Integrated rafter hook for quick and easy storage
Tool Connect Chip Ready - Chip pocket accepts Tool Connect Chip DCE042 and connects with Tool Connect Site Manager app for easy asset management on the jobsite. (DCE042 sold separately)
Compatible With All DEWALT 20V MAX* and FLEXVOLT Batteries
Minimizes Dust - Optional dust port allows connection to a dust extractor to minimize dust during cutting (DWE575DC Dust Port sold separately).
includes: (1) DCS573 20V MAX* 7-1/4 in Brushless Cordless Circular Saw With FLEXVOLT Advantage
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
** Using a DCB606 FLEXVOLTbattery vs DCB205 DEWALT 20V MAX* battery (batteries sold separately)

rows.title: 20V MAX* XR Cordless Brushless 7-1/4 in. Circular Saw With POWER DETECT Tool Technology (Tool Only)
rows.description: Make tough cuts using the 20V MAX* XR 7-1/4 in. Brushless Circular Saw with POWER DETECT tool technology. POWER DETECT Tool Technology senses the battery you're using and adjusts the tool's output for optimized efficiency. When using a 20V MAX* 8Ah battery, this saw delivers up to 54% more power compared to the DCS570 Circular Saw using a DCB205 battery**. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Up To 54% More Power** - With POWER DETECT Tool Technology
Pro-Grade Cuts - Saw up to 2 in. deep at a 45 degrees angle and 2-9/16 in. at a 90 degrees angle
Brighten Dark Workspaces - On-board LED for enhanced visibility and cut accuracy
additional_features: Safely Avoid Accidental Cuts - With brake that rapidly stops the blade when the trigger is released
Convenient Storage - On the jobsite with built-in rafter hook
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 volts. Nominal voltage is 18.
** DCS574 Circular Saw outputs up to 54% more power vs. the DCS570 Circular Saw with a DCB205 battery.

rows.title: 60V MAX* 7-1/4 in. Brushless Circular Saw With Electronic Brake (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on tough jobs with the 60V MAX* Brushless Cordless 7-1/4 in. Circular Saw with Electronic Brake. Combining the power of a corded circular saw with the portability and convenience of cordless, this saw a no-load speed of 5,800 rpm. This tool is compatible with FLEXVOLT 20/60V MAX* batteries. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Up to 47% more power vs the DCS575**
Uses a 7-1/4 in. circular saw blade and features a maximum cut depth of 2-9/16 in. at a 90 degrees bevel.
Maximum bevel capacity of 57 degrees with bevel stops at 22.5 degrees and 45 degrees
additional_features: Electric brake stops the blade after the trigger is released
Integrated LED for increased visibility and cut accuracy
Integrated rafter hook for quick and easy storage
includes: (1) DCS578 60V MAX* Brushless 7-1/2 in. Cordless Circular Saw
disclaimers: * Maximum initial battery voltage (measured without a workload) is 20 and 60 volts. Nominal voltage is 18 and 54.
** The DEWALT DCS578 with a DCB609 60V MAX* FLEXVOLT battery has up to 47% more power vs the DEWALT DCS575 with a DCB606 60V MAX* FLEXVOLT battery

rows.title: 7-1/4 in. Lightweight Circular Saw With Contractor Bag (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on your toughest applications with the 7 1/4 in. Lightweight Circular Saw. At only 8.8 lbs., this lightweight circular saw features a bevel capacity of 57 degrees and 2-9/16 in. depth of cut capacity provide versatility. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Among the lightest saws in its class (8.8 lbs.)
Electric brake stops the blade after trigger is released
15 amp motor delivers power for even the toughest applications
additional_features: 57 degrees beveling capacity with stops at 45 degrees and 22.5 degrees
Depth of cut capacity of 2 9/16 in.
Ball bearing lower guard provides long life in harsh environments
Durable high grade Aluminum smooth base for accurate cuts
Lower guard design improves performance when making bevel cuts and cutting shims
An integrated dust blower allows the user to clear its line of sight while cutting
Patented Tough cord protection system, provides 3x durability against cord pull-out
On-board blade wrench storage, allows for easy storage and convenience for blade changes
includes: (1) Carbide Tipped 7-1/4 in Circular Saw Blade

rows.title: 7-1/4 in. Worm Drive Circular Saw With Electric Brake (Tool Only)
rows.description: Take on a wide variety of applications with this 7-1/4 in. Worm Drive Circular Saw that delivers 4,800 rpm. Featuring a lightweight and durable magnesium construction, this circular saw optimizes user handling, comfort, and strength. Battery & Charger Sold Separately
features: Lightweight Magnesium and Aluminum Construction including Durable Magnesium Footplate
Extra Wide Sawhook accepts materials up to 2 3/4" wide
Toughcord cord protection with 4X Better Cord-jerk Protection
additional_features: 53 Degree Bevel with stops at 22.5 and 45
Electric brake stops blade after trigger is released
Accepts DWS5100 Dual Port Rip Guide (Sold Separately0
